note: Cold impl-judge rejected --format json: frozen build.feature requires stdout JSON with a 'built' array; first cut emitted written/rows/summary with no 'built' array and the e2e assertion had drifted to check 'written'. Reshaped the JSON payload to group rows by status (built/skipped/failed arrays) + summary counts, corrected the assertion to the frozen oracle. Re-judged: all 18 frozen scenarios pass.
